title: Iran Boosts Natanz Enrichment to 60% Amid IAEA Rebuke

contents:
## Iran Boosts Natanz Enrichment to 60% Amid IAEA Rebuke

### Overview
Iran ramps up uranium enrichment at Natanz facility. IAEA inspectors report non-compliance with nuclear safeguards. Tensions escalate over undeclared nuclear materials.

### Event Details
Iran advances uranium enrichment operations at the Natanz underground facility, reaching 60% purity levels according to latest IAEA reports. Inspectors detect traces of uranium particles enriched to near-weapons grade in undeclared locations, prompting sharp rebukes from the UN nuclear watchdog. Iran dismisses findings, accuses IAEA of bias, continues centrifuge installations despite international pressure. Fordow site maintains high enrichment activities, supports overall program expansion. IRGC oversees security enhancements around key nuclear installations, deploys advanced drone surveillance. Recent satellite imagery from Maxar Technologies reveals new construction at Natanz, suggests expanded cascade halls for faster production. Iranian officials boast technological breakthroughs, claim peaceful intentions while rejecting snapback sanctions threats. Western diplomats convene emergency talks, push for renewed JCPOA negotiations. US intelligence assessments highlight IRGC missile developments intertwined with nuclear advancements, warn of breakout timelines shortening to weeks. Iran conducts missile tests, showcases hypersonic capabilities, integrates drone swarms for potential strike roles. Analysts from Institute for Science and International Security dissect satellite data, confirm underground expansions evade airstrikes. Regional powers monitor closely, Israel pledges preemptive actions if thresholds cross red lines. IAEA Director General Rafael Grossi urges transparency, demands access to suspect sites. Iran counters with counter-inspections, escalates rhetoric against adversaries. Global markets react, oil prices spike on escalation fears. Experts predict stalled diplomacy leads to covert operations or overt conflict.

### Source Context
@IranSpec (Iran Spectrum) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on iran nuclear enrichment natanz fordow irgc missile drone irgc analysis satellite.
